name: Binary Search
description: Search a sorted array for a target value in O(log n) time
preconditions: array must be sorted in ascending order
array must have at least one element
postconditions: returns index of target if found
result index is within bounds [0, len(arr))

name: Linear Search
description: Search an array for a target value in O(n) time
preconditions: array must have at least one element
postconditions: returns index of first occurrence of target if found

name: Bubble Sort
description: Sort an array using bubble sort in O(n²) time
postconditions: array is sorted in ascending order

name: Merge Sort
description: Sort an array using merge sort in O(n log n) time
postconditions: array is sorted in ascending order

name: Quick Sort
description: Sort an array using quicksort in O(n log n) average time
postconditions: array is sorted in ascending order

name: Insertion Sort
description: Sort array by inserting elements into sorted portion
postconditions: array is sorted in ascending order

name: Selection Sort
description: Sort by repeatedly finding minimum element

name: Heap Sort
description: Sort using heap data structure

name: Counting Sort
description: Sort by counting occurrences (non-comparative)

name: GCD (Euclidean)
description: Compute greatest common divisor
preconditions: a, b must be non-negative integers
postconditions: returns GCD of a and b

name: Fibonacci (Iterative)
description: Compute nth Fibonacci number iteratively

name: Power Function
description: Compute x^n using fast exponentiation
preconditions: x must be non-zero for negative n

name: Partition (Quicksort utility)
description: Partition array around pivot for quicksort
preconditions: array must be valid, low <= high

name: Reverse Array
description: Reverse array in-place
code:
def reverse(arr):
    left, right = 0, len(arr) - 1
    while left < right:
        arr[left], arr[right] = arr[right], arr[left]
        left += 1
        right -= 1
    return arr

name: Palindrome Check
description: Check if string is palindrome
postconditions: returns True if palindrome, False otherwise

name: Two Sum
description: Find indices of two numbers that add up to target using hash map
postconditions: returns indices [i, j] such that nums[i] + nums[j] == target

name: Maximum Subarray (Kadane's Algorithm)
description: Find contiguous subarray with the largest sum
code:
def max_subarray(nums):
    max_sum = nums[0]
    current_sum = nums[0]
    for i in range(1, len(nums)):
        current_sum = max(nums[i], current_sum + nums[i])
        max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum)
    return max_sum
preconditions: array must have at least one element
postconditions: returns maximum sum of any contiguous subarray

name: Matrix Transpose
description: Transpose a matrix (swap rows and columns)
preconditions: matrix must be non-empty and rectangular
postconditions: result[j][i] == matrix[i][j] for all valid i, j

name: Reverse String In-Place
description: Reverse a list of characters in-place using two pointers
code:
def reverse_string(s):
    left, right = 0, len(s) - 1
    while left < right:
        s[left], s[right] = s[right], s[left]
        left += 1
        right -= 1
    return s
preconditions: s must be a mutable sequence (list of characters)

name: Binary Search Insert Position (bisect_left)
description: Find leftmost insertion point for target in sorted array to maintain order
preconditions: array must be sorted in ascending order
postconditions: returns index where target can be inserted to keep array sorted
